creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think you should have waited for comment... Was that an accidental push?

The iana one has been expired for the last 6 weeks. Did they finally update? My laptop has been whining about it. that's why we switch from the first place... And that's why I didn't just make the change, but posted here in the bug.

As much as I was resistant to mirroring this, maybe we need to mirror it to get ipv6 connectivity.
